Get in Touch About Me

About Me

Hi there! I'm an Education Counsellor at one of the top universities in Kota Kinabalu, Petaling Jaya, Cyberjaya and Johor Bahru. I'm here to help you navigate the admissions process, offering personalised advice, and guiding you to the perfect program that aligns with your interests and career aspirations.

Whether you're a fresh graduate or looking to further your studies, I'm dedicated to making your journey to higher education smooth and successful.

My Specialties

Comprehensive support for your educational journey

🎓

Academic Pathway Planning

Guiding students from foundation, certificate, diploma to degree with clear progression routes.

📘

Course & Career Matching

Helping students choose programmes based on interest, strength, and long term career goals.

📝

Higher Education Advisory

Providing accurate information about Malaysian university systems, MQA recognition, and programme accreditation.

🖥️

Career Prospect Advisory

Explaining job market demand and employability outcomes after graduation.

💵

Scholarship & Financial Aid Guidance

Advising on tuition rebates, zakat assistance, PTPTN, and education funding options.

👫

Parent Consultation Services

Providing counselling sessions for parents who want clarity before making education decisions.

Frequently Asked Questions

We've got a fantastic selection of diploma, degree, and postgraduate programs, covering everything from business and IT to education and science!

You can easily fill out the registration form, or if you'd prefer, feel free to reach out to me directly for a step-by-step guide!

Absolutely! We've got a bunch of scholarships and financial aid options available, all tailored to help students based on their academic achievements and financial situations (just a heads-up, the Terms & Conditions apply).

Awesome! I'd be happy to set up a guided tour of the campus for you. Just give me a shout on the phone or email when you have a moment.
